TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Zhuoxi Itini i Hualien ko Zhuoxi Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 1,011.71 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 921.78 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 65.08 km²), 6,040 ko tamdaw i Zhuoxi Siyang, 1,512 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 5,768 a tamdaw, pakaala to 95%(Bunun, Seediq, Truku) no polong no tamdaw. o Bunun, Seediq, Truku ko sa'alomanay i Hualien. O kasaniyarona 6 ko cun, 17 ko niyaro' i Zhuoxi Siyang. Hunhungaz , Silupatun , Sikihiki , Siulang , Izukan , Nakahila , Valau , Dauqpusan , Tavila , Taluk , Lamuan , Saiku , Tausa , Swasal , Bgurah branaw , Sinkam , Panital .
S.PHON: *ħo~u~uo~uxi itini i ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u *ħo~u~uo~uxi sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u *,***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i *ħo~u~uo~uxi sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un, səəɬ~ɮi*, tro~u~uko~u~u) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un, səəɬ~ɮi*, tro~u~uko~u~u ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i ħo~u~uaɾiən. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i *ħo~u~uo~uxi sijaŋ. ħo~u~unħo~u~uŋa* , siɾo~u~upato~u~un , sikiħiki , sio~u~uɾaŋ , i*o~u~ukan , nakaħiɾa , b~vaɾao~u~u , ɬ~ɮao~u~u*po~u~usan , tab~viɾa , taɾo~u~uk , ɾamo~u~uan , saiko~u~u , tao~u~usa , swasaɾ , b~b~v*o~u~uraħ b~b~vranaw , sinkam , panitaɾ .
S.FORM: Zhuoxi Itini i Hualien ko Zhuoxi Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 1,011.71 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 921.78 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 65.08 km²), 6,040 ko tamdaw i Zhuoxi Siyang, 1,512 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 5,768 a tamdaw, pakaala to 95%(Bunun, Seediq, Truku) no polong no tamdaw. o Bunun, Seediq, Truku ko sa'alomanay i Hualien. O kasaniyarona 6 ko cun, 17 ko niyaro' i Zhuoxi Siyang. Hunhungaz , Silupatun , Sikihiki , Siulang , Izukan , Nakahila , Valau , Dauqpusan , Tavila , Taluk , Lamuan , Saiku , Tausa , Swasal , Bgurah branaw , Sinkam , Panital .
S.PHON: *ħo~u~uo~uxi itini i ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u *ħo~u~uo~uxi sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u *,***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i *ħo~u~uo~uxi sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un, səəɬ~ɮi*, tro~u~uko~u~u) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un, səəɬ~ɮi*, tro~u~uko~u~u ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i ħo~u~uaɾiən. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i *ħo~u~uo~uxi sijaŋ. ħo~u~unħo~u~uŋa* , siɾo~u~upato~u~un , sikiħiki , sio~u~uɾaŋ , i*o~u~ukan , nakaħiɾa , b~vaɾao~u~u , ɬ~ɮao~u~u*po~u~usan , tab~viɾa , taɾo~u~uk , ɾamo~u~uan , saiko~u~u , tao~u~usa , swasaɾ , b~b~v*o~u~uraħ b~b~vranaw , sinkam , panitaɾ .
